name: Execution of Trojanized 3CX Application
description: A known trojanized version of the 3CX Desktop application has been executed, indicating a critical supply chain compromise.

parameters.name: Timestamp
parameters.description: The timestamp of the process creation event.

parameters.name: ComputerName
parameters.description: The hostname where the trojanized 3CX app was executed.

parameters.name: User
parameters.description: The user account under which the process ran.

parameters.name: Image
parameters.description: The full path to the executable image (3CXDesktopApp.exe).

parameters.name: Product
parameters.description: The product name from the file metadata.

parameters.name: Company
parameters.description: The company name from the file metadata.

parameters.name: FileVersion
parameters.description: The file version of the executed 3CX Desktop App.

parameters.name: RuleName
parameters.description: The Sysmon rule name that triggered the event, if available.
